sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60307" key="kta/nths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κτάντης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (κτείνω</foreign>) <sense id="n60307.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">murderer</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0208.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ara</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
